note: All three mathematical claims verified correct: (1) GNS of rank-r density matrix gives id^{+r} on C^n tensor C^r (dim = nr, verified via null space dimension n(n-r)); (2) Commutant is M_r(C) by tensor product commutant theorem for irreducible M_n(C)=B(C^n); (3) dim_R(M_r(C)^{sa})=r^2 (r diagonal + r(r-1) off-diagonal real parameters). Two minor challenges raised: missing deps on 1.6.1/1.6.2, and inference type should be theorem not assumption.
